game_waiting_restart_confirm: Waiting for other players to confirm…
home_tagline: Slide every pearl off the board before your opponents do.
form_share_link_hint: Share this link with other players so they can join your game.
error_404_detail: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
error_403_detail: You don't have permission to view this page.
error_500_detail: An unexpected error occurred on our end. Try again in a moment.
game_waiting: Waiting for another player to join…
push_notifications_blocked_hint: Notifications are blocked. Enable them in your browser settings.
dice_locked_tap_to_select: Locked on {target} — tap dice to select
dice_one_die_selected: 1 die selected for {target} — tap the cup to roll
dice_n_dice_selected: {count} dice selected for {target} — tap the cup to roll
dice_pick_target_row: Tap a highlighted row to pick your target
dice_no_more_moves: No more moves — confirm to end your turn
error_name_taken: This name is already taken in this game
error_name_too_long: Name must be 20 characters or fewer
a11y_cup_disabled: All dice are kept — unlock at least one to shake
a11y_qr_code_invite: QR code for game invite link
rules_objective_p1_a: Each player has a wooden board with
rules_objective_p1_c: . On your turn you roll dice, pick a target number, and use matching dice to slide pearls off your board. The first player to empty all 12 rows wins.
rules_objective_p2: The board below shows a fresh start: every row filled with 7 pearls, ready to play.
rules_setup_step2: All 12 rows are filled with their full complement of 7 pearls.
rules_setup_step3: To determine who goes first, every player rolls one die — highest result starts. Re-roll ties.
rules_turn_intro: Each turn you commit to a single target number and keep rolling until the dice can no longer form it.
rules_step1_sub: If no number 1–12 can be formed from the current dice for any row that still has pearls, your turn ends immediately and the dice pass to the next player.
rules_step2_sub: Select the dice that form it:
rules_step2_bullet_low: Select a single die showing that face value.
rules_step2_bullet_high: Select a pair of dice whose face values sum to the target.
rules_step3_sub: Each selected die (or pair) removes one pearl from the target row. Multiple matches in a single roll each remove one pearl — e.g. four dice all showing 3 removes 4 pearls from row 3.
rules_step4_strong: Lock your number and re-roll the rest.
rules_step4_sub: Set the used dice aside — your target is now locked for the rest of this turn. Re-roll the remaining dice and repeat from step 2. Your turn ends when the remaining dice can no longer form the target.
rules_example_p_d: are staged (shown separated from the rest). Once confirmed, those pearls slide off and the three dice are set aside. The remaining dice are re-rolled still targeting 4.
rules_cleared_p1_a: If the last pearl of your target row slides off the board, your turn
rules_cleared_p1_b: : all dice return to the cup and you go back to step 1 — free to choose any new target number.
rules_cleared_p2: Cleared rows show a lock icon. The board on the right shows row 7 just cleared — the player gets all 6 dice back for a fresh roll.
rules_scoring_p: Once a winner is declared, the remaining players are ranked by their score — higher is better:
rules_scoring_example: Each cleared pearl in row N scores N points — a fully cleared board scores 546 (7 × (1+2+…+12)). Clearing high-numbered rows earns more points. The player with the highest score earns the best ranking.
join_full_detail: This game is already in progress or at capacity.
initiative_reset_player_joined: A player joined — rolling order reset
initiative_tie_must_reroll: Tie — roll again to break it!
initiative_tie_waiting_reroll: Tie — waiting for others to re-roll
